KARA SEA.
RUSSIA.
DNC 22.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING
   0700Z TO 1300Z DAILY 17 THRU 19 FEB AND
   0700Z TO 1700Z DAILY 20 THRU 22 FEB
   IN AREAS BOUND BY:
   A. 71-31.00N 062-27.00E, 71-59.00N 061-12.00E,
      71-15.00N 058-22.00E, 70-47.00N 059-36.00E.
   B. 74-44.00N 078-25.00E, 74-14.00N 073-31.00E,
      73-42.00N 074-18.00E, 74-11.00N 079-05.00E.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 221800Z FEB 23.
